mapper.update: INSERT INTO customer_transaction_summary (customer_id, recent_3m_total_amount, recent_3m_avg_amount, is_new_customer, stats_updated_at) SELECT customer_id, SUM(total_amount) as recent_3m_total_amount, AVG(total_amount) as recent_3m_avg_amount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) <= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_new_customer, NOW() as stats_updated_at FROM ( SELECT customer_id, SUM(order_amount) as total_amount FROM sales_order WHERE order_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) AND status IN ('completed', 'shipped') GROUP BY customer_id, DATE_FORMAT(order_date, '%Y-%m') ) monthly_sales GROUP BY customer_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE recent_3m_total_amount = VALUES(recent_3m_total_amount), recent_3m_avg_amount = VALUES(recent_3m_avg_amount), is_new_customer = VALUES(is_new_customer), stats_updated_at = VALUES(stats_updated_at);
